titleStmt.title: SII 9.212: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao

No. 212. (A.R. No. 276 of 1905.) ON A SLAB SET UP CLOSE TO THE PRAKARA ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE BLOCKED-UP WESTERN ENTRANCE TO THE TRIPURANTAKESVARA TEMPLE AT TRIPURAN-TAKAM, MARKAPURAM TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 51, Parābhava, Jyēshṭha, amāvāsye, Sōmavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to 1126 A.D. June 21 Monday, there being a solar eclipse on the following day. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Jayantīpura. His general Anantapāladaṇḍarasa is stated to have made a gift of the village Chāpalamaḍuge in the Moṭṭavāḍi-nāḍu for the service of the god Tripurāntakadēva. The arasa title of the Brāhman general is noteworthy.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāśrayakulatilaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdratāraṁ jayaṁtīpura
nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rā
jyaṁgeyvuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāsāmaṁttādhipati mahāpracaṁ
ḍanāyakaṁ vibudhavaradāyakaṁ sujanaprasannaṁ nu
ḍidumattennaṁ gōtrapavitra parāṁganāputraṁ turagarēvaṁ
ta vairikṛtāṁttaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁga nāmā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhāna
Anaṁttapāladaṁḍarasaru śrīmat cāḷukyavikramava
rṣada 51 neya parābhavasaṁvatsarada jyēṣṭadamāvā
sye sōmavāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇa nimittadiṁ śrīpa
rvatapūrvvadvāra śrītripurāṁttakadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōga
kkaṁ dhūpadīpakkaṁ bhaigina naivēdyakkaṁ baigina pūjegaṁ khaṁ
ḍasphuṭitajīrṇōddhārakkaṁ moṭṭavāḍināḍoḷa
gaṇa cāpalamaḍuge catussīmasahitaṁ dhārā
pūrvakamāḍi biṭṭaru . Ī dharmmava svadharmmadi pratipā
ḷisidaṁge gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētravarghyatīrthagaḷa
lu gōsahasragaḷaṁ dānamāḍida phalamakku . Ī dha
rmmavanaḷida mahāpātakaṁge Ī tīrtthagaḷalu gōbrāhmaṇapa
rassahasravadheyaṁ māḍida mahāpātakamakku . svadattā
ṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣa
sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.212 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
